info.title: ISBNdb API v2
info.description:
Definition of ISBNdb.com API v2.

***Note: A 404 Not Found response for an ISBN lookup typically
indicates that the book information is not yet available in our database.
However, due to frequent updates, there is a high probability that the data will be 
added shortly, often within a minute or up to 24 hours. We recommend trying your request 
again after a while, as the information may soon become accessible***

get.description: Returns the name and a list of books by the author.

parameters.name: language
parameters.description: Language code to filter books by language (e.g., `en` for English, `fr` for French, etc.)

schema.description: Language code to filter books by language (e.g., `en` for English, `fr` for French, etc.)

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The number of page to retrieve, please note the API will not return more than 10,000 results no matter how you paginate them

schema.description: The number of page to retrieve, please note the API will not return more than 10,000 results no matter how you paginate them

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: How many items should be returned per page, maximum of 1,000

schema.description: How many items should be returned per page, maximum of 1,000

200.description: The query string found results in the author's database

get.description:
Returns the book details. 
        
**A 404 Not Found response for an ISBN lookup typically indicates that the book information is not yet available
in our database. However, due to frequent updates, there is a high probability that the data will be added shortly,
often within a minute or up to 24 hours. We recommend trying your request again after a while, as the information
may soon become accessible.**

parameters.name: with_prices
parameters.description:
Whether to include prices in the response. 
        
***Performance Impact:*** Enabling this will increase response time, as current prices are fetched from vendors in real time.

post.description:
Retrieves a list of books matching the provided array of ISBNs. This endpoint is available on all plans and does not use pagination.

**Request Limits per Plan:**
* **Academic:** Up to 10 ISBNs per request.
* **Basic:** Up to 100 ISBNs per request.
* **Pro, Premium, and higher:** Up to 1,000 ISBNs per request.

**Quota Usage (Important):** Each requested ISBN counts as a separate API call against your daily limit. For example, a single request containing 100 ISBNs will deduct 100 calls from your daily quota.

**Response Behavior:**
* The response will only include books that successfully match an ISBN in our database. 
* Any submitted ISBNs that are not found will be silently ignored and excluded from the response.
* **Note:** Pricing information is not returned by this endpoint.

get.description:
This returns a list of books that match the query.

**This endpoint does not return pricing information.**

parameters.name: year
parameters.description: Filter books by year of publication

schema.description: Filter books by year of publication

parameters.name: edition
parameters.description: Filter books by edition

schema.description: Filter books by edition

parameters.name: shouldMatchAll
parameters.description:
If set to `1` or `true`, the API will return books where the title 
        or author exactly contains all the words entered by the user.

schema.description:
If set to `1` or `true`, the API will return books where the title 
        or author exactly contains all the words entered by the user.

parameters.name: column
parameters.description:
Search limited to this column:
* `` - Empty value search in every column
* `title` - Only searches in Books Title
* `author` - Only searches books by the given Author
* `date_published` - Only searches books in a given year, e.g. 1998
* `subjects` - Only searches books by the given subject, e.g. physics

schema.description:
Search limited to this column:
* `` - Empty value search in every column
* `title` - Only searches in Books Title
* `author` - Only searches books by the given Author
* `date_published` - Only searches books in a given year, e.g. 1998
* `subjects` - Only searches books by the given subject, e.g. physics

get.description:
Retrieves a list of book ISBNs that have been added or modified. This endpoint is designed for frequent incremental synchronization.

**Important Notes:**
* **Plan limits:** Available exclusively for **Premium** plans and higher.
* **History limit:** The update history is strictly limited to the last **7 days**.
* **Quota:** Calling this endpoint does not count towards your daily API limits.

parameters.description: The number of page to retrieve

parameters.description: How many items should be returned per page, maximum of 1,000

schema.description: How many items should be returned per page, maximum of 1,000

parameters.description: Filter by last updated date (Format: YYYY-MM-DD)

schema.description: Filter by last updated date (Format: YYYY-MM-DD)

200.description: Returns a list of recently updated book ISBNs
